topic: My tires are caked in red mud each morning though I only ever drive paved city streets.
title: My Tires Are Caked In Red Mud Every Morning | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My tires were caked in thick red mud each morning, though I only drive paved city streets.
scenes.image_prompt: a car tire coated in wet red clay mud on a clean city street, dim dawn light, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I live downtown. Concrete and asphalt everywhere.
scenes.image_prompt: a grey city street lined with buildings at dawn, wet pavement, fog, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: No red soil for fifty miles.
scenes.image_prompt: a distant red clay field under an overcast sky, bare and empty, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The mud was packed deep in the treads, still damp.
scenes.image_prompt: a close composition of a car tire tread packed with damp red mud, dim garage light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I washed all four. By dawn they were filthy again.
scenes.image_prompt: a clean car parked in a garage with one muddy red tire, single bulb, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The odometer never moved. The mileage stayed exactly the same.
scenes.image_prompt: a dashboard odometer in a dim cabin, blurred steering wheel, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I followed the red trail from my driveway.
scenes.image_prompt: faint red mud tire tracks leading down a wet driveway into fog, dim dawn, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The tracks stopped at my garage. They started there too.
scenes.image_prompt: red muddy tracks ending abruptly on clean concrete before a closed garage door, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then I found a gravesite worth of red clay in the wheel wells.
scenes.image_prompt: thick red clay packed into a car wheel well, dim garage lamp, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Buried in the mud was a small wooden cross.
scenes.image_prompt: a small weathered wooden cross half buried in red mud on a garage floor, dim light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I parked it on the street after that, far from the house.
scenes.image_prompt: a lone car parked on a foggy empty street far from any house, dim streetlamp, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning the red mud led from the car to my front door.
scenes.image_prompt: a trail of red muddy footprints leading up a porch to a front door at dawn, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
